Description:
Model
Brand: ASUS
Model: P524 HARPE MINI CORE
Part Number: 90MP04D0-BMAA00


Details
Type Type: Wired
Interface: USB 2.0
Mouse Grip Style: Claw
Tracking Method Tracking Method: Optical
Resolution (DPI) Resolution (DPI): 100 ~ 12,000 DPI
Hand Orientation Hand Orientation: Right Hand
Buttons: 5 Programmable Buttons
Scrolling Capability: 1 x Wheel
Color: Black


OS / System Requirement
Operating System Supported: Windows 10/ 11


Features
Features: Sensor: PAW3311 12,000 DPI (<3% CPI deviation)
Max Speed: 300 IPS
Max Acceleration: 35G
Polling Rate: 1000 Hz
Switch: ROG Micro Switch II 100M
Cable Type: ROG Paracord
Cable Length: 2.0 m
Onboard Memory: 5 Customizable Profiles
Hot keys
Hardware reset:
	Left click + Right click + Scroll click + DPI btn
DPI on-the-scroll tuning:
	Enter:Hold Dpi switch button for 3 seconds
	Leave:Press Dpi switch button to leave
Demo mode:
	Enter:Hold (Left click + Right click) +Insert USB (Link to Adaptor DCP) for 3 seconds
	Leave:Hold (Left click + Right click) +Insert USB (Link to Adaptor DCP) for 3 seconds
Bootloader mode:
	Hold (Left click+Scroll click+Right click) + Insert USB
Dimension: 117(L) x 63(W) x 37(H) mm
Weight: 52g (witout cable)


Package Contents
Package Contents: 1 x P524 ROG Harpe Mini Core gaming mouse
1 x Warranty Card
1 x Quick Start Guide
Label: Mouse Asus ROG Harpe Mini Core Black
